title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 427.165 - Uniform commercial code not affected by act
text:
427.165.  Uniform commercial code not affected by act. — The obligations and rights of the creditor and the debtor with respect to the collateral as provided by the uniform commercial code are not affected by sections 427.110 to 427.190.
(L. 1997 H.B. 257)
